titleStmt.title: SII 9.124: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 124. (A.R. No. 292 of 1918.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN THE TANK-BED AT HIREMAGALAGERI, HARAPANAHALLI TALUK, BELLARY DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is damaged and dated Śaka 981, Vikāri, Śrāvaṇa, puṇṇame, Maṅgaḷavāra, Siṅgha-saṅkrānti and Sōma-grahaṇa corresponding to A.D. 1059 July 27, Tuesday, on which day there was a lunar eclipse. It refers itself to the reign of the Chāḷukya king Trailōkyamalladēva. It records that, when the Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Siṅgaṇadēva was ruling over Uchchaṅgi thirty a grant of some land was made for the service of the god Svayambhu-Ka[lidēva] of Mēgaṇageṟe, after washing the feet of Mūrujāvi-Paṇḍita, the disciple of Āryadēva, the āchārya of the temple of Svayambhu-Trikūṭēśvara.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīpṛthvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirāja
paramēśvara mabhaṭṭāraka satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyā
bharaṇaṁ śrīmattraiḷōkyamalladēvara
leya nelevīḍinūḷu sukha thāvinō jyaṁgeyyu
parādhakaṁ samadhigatapaṁcamahā
śvaraṁ bhuvanaykarāmaṁ
pratyakṣa ditya para
nārīputraṁ śatrunikṣatramaṁḍalaṁ gaṇḍa
meṟevadaṇḍigaranniriva vikramōttuṁga śrīmanma
hāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ siṁgaṇadēvar Uccaṁgi mūvattuma sūḷga
mumaṁ duṣṭanigrahaśiṣṭapratipāḷaneyiṁdāḷuttamuccaṁgiya kōṭayā
®du sakavarṣa 981 neya vikāri saṁvatsarada śrāheya śrāvaṇada puṇname maṁ
gaḷavāradaṁdu siṅghasaṁkrānti sōmagrahaṇanimittadiṁ mēgaṇageṟeya śvayaṁbhuka
nivēdyakkaṁ dhūpakkaṁ maṭada śatrakkamendu svayaṁbhutrikaṭēśva
radēvara maṭadācāryyar Āriyadēva ṣyar mūṟujāvipaṇḍitara kālaṁ karci
dhārāpūrvakaṁ māḍi Uccaṁgi mūvattaṟa baḷiya kāḍavārada paḷḷiya baḍagaṇa ma
ṭṭida nīrvvayellamaṁ koṭṭarī dharmmamaṁ kālakālāntaradiṁdāvanōrvvanaḷidavaṁ vāra
ṇāsi kurukṣētradoḷu kavileyuṁ bāhmaṇarumaṁ tapaśviyumanaḷida
pātakake salvar . © bahubhirvvasudhā bhuktvā rājabhiḥ śakarājabhiḥ
yasya tasya yadā bhūmi tasya tasya tadā phaḷaṁ . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ
vā yō harēti vasundharā . ṣaṣṭhirvarṣaṣahaśrāṇi mriṣṭāyāṁ jāya
tē krimiḥ . Ārānuṁ biṭṭar biḍatīradenalvēḍa naḍasuvātane biṭṭaṁ
baḷaṁ kaivāradi rakṣipudu pakṣapātadoḷellaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 9.124 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
